Title: 'I just want to know if he's still alive': The long ordeal of families searching for loved ones lost at sea
Subhead: Since the beginning of the year, shipwrecks in the Mediterranean and Atlantic have multiplied, leaving friends and relatives without news of those who attempt the crossing.

Title: Cultural leaders rally to save French heritage under threat
Subhead: The launch of a heritage pass, the search for sponsors and the commitment of volunteers all point to the same effort: those working to preserve France's heritage sites are looking for new ways to avoid a looming funding gap.

Title: Martin Margiela puts 200 pieces from his personal archives up for sale
Subhead: On July 9 in Paris, personal items and prototypes from the famously secretive designer will be auctioned. By personally initiating and organizing the sale, Martin Margiela, who left the fashion world in 2008, is offering a glimpse into his creative process. It is a radical gesture that mirrors his artistic journey.

Title: In the age of AI, Chinese universities overhaul their curricula
Subhead: Universities across China are undergoing a major transformation to align with the economic priorities of the Chinese government and to tackle youth unemployment. To survive, some disciplines, such as foreign languages, now have to attach themselves to hard sciences.

Title: Sleeping in a cellar, waiting at a funeral home, riding the tram: How the French are improvising to survive the heatwave
